channel.title: Journal of Chinese Film Studies
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Chinese Film Studies

item.title: Introduction: Games, Gaming, and Interactive Aesthetics in Contemporary Chinese and Sinophone Cinema
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0049

item.title: Soundscape and Sense of Presence in the VR Experience of Madame Pirate: Becoming a Legend
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0010

item.title: Consuming the White Terror: Transmedia Adaptation and Franchise-Building of Detention
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0004

item.title: Tracing the Shape of Despair: Video Game Aesthetics and Actor-Network Theory in An Elephant Sitting Still
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0012

item.title: How Does Jade Dynasty Become a Big IP? Mapping Digital Media Ecology in Contemporary China
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0007

item.title: Towards a Techno-Hauntological Aesthetic: Immiscible Time and the Spiritual Imagination in Bodyless (Shishenji, 2019) by Huang Hsin-Chien
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0003

item.title: Ambivalent Utopias: Corporate Biopower and the Gendered Limits of Agency in Reset
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2023-0060

item.title: An Inquiry into Gender and Queer Issues in Chinese-Language Sci-Fi Film: A Case Study of The Soul
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0014

item.title: Century-Old Hong Kong Films and the Chinese Cultural Tradition
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0021

item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0037

item.title: The World is the “Hometown” of the Camera: Interview with Jia Zhangke
item.description: Article by Bingbing Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jcfs-2024-0039
